response.overview: # Translation  The story follows Adnan (Imran Aqil), who works as a dispatch rider and is forced to change his career after his company closes due to financial problems. Adnan begins to feel frustrated and bored staying at home. Adnan, who lives with his best friend Bobby (Wanns Ahmad), tries to find and start a new job. However, the jobs he takes do not feel suited to his nature, as he has always worked riding a motorcycle on the roads. Adnan and Bobby eventually take the opportunity to work as part-time runners, considering that Adnan is someone who is active riding around on the roads with his motorcycle. Adnan is very committed to his new career. He perseveres through various situations when dealing with merchants and customers who have all sorts of peculiarities. Adnan's sincerity in carrying out his duties successfully overcomes all the situations he faces, including a planned drug distribution syndicate that wants to trap Adnan as a drug mule.
response.title: Adnan Runner
